subcodes.first_line: The glance of the Ancient King's providence hath ever been and shall remain directed from the Most Great Prison towards His loved ones. O Ali, the Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لحاظ عنایت مالک قدم از سجن اعظم باحبای خود متوجه بوده و خواهد بود ای علی قلم
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @growth of the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
